select
    merchant_id,
    merchant_name,
    category,
    country,
    status,
    created_at,
    updated_at
from "wave"."raw"."merchants"

select
    payment_id,
    wallet_id,
    merchant_id,
    amount,
    currency,
    status,
    created_at,
    updated_at,
    country,
    channel
from "wave"."raw"."payments"

select
    wallet_id,
    user_created_at,
    kyc_tier,
    country,
    is_agent,
    status,
    updated_at
from "wave"."raw"."wallets"
select * from "wave"."raw"."merchants"
select * from "wave"."raw"."wallets"

with all_values as (

    select
        category as value_field,
        count(*) as n_records

    from "wave"."main_staging"."stg_merchants"
    group by category

)

select *
from all_values
where value_field not in (
    'supermarket','ecommerce','taxi','utility','other'
)

with all_values as (

    select
        status as value_field,
        count(*) as n_records

    from "wave"."main_staging"."stg_merchants"
    group by status

)

select *
from all_values
where value_field not in (
    'active','inactive','suspended'
)

select country
from "wave"."main_staging"."stg_merchants"
where country is null

select merchant_id
from "wave"."main_staging"."stg_merchants"
where merchant_id is null

select merchant_name
from "wave"."main_staging"."stg_merchants"
where merchant_name is null

select status
from "wave"."main_staging"."stg_merchants"
where status is null

select
    merchant_id as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "wave"."main_staging"."stg_merchants"
where merchant_id is not null
group by merchant_id
having count(*) > 1

with all_values as (

    select
        channel as value_field,
        count(*) as n_records

    from "wave"."main_staging"."stg_payments"
    group by channel

)

select *
from all_values
where value_field not in (
    'ussd','app','agent'
)

with all_values as (

    select
        status as value_field,
        count(*) as n_records

    from "wave"."main_staging"."stg_payments"
    group by status

)

select *
from all_values
where value_field not in (
    'success','failed','reversed'
)

select

from (select * from "wave"."main_staging"."stg_payments" where updated_at::date >= current_date - 1) dbt_subquery

where not(amount >= 0)

with child as (
    select merchant_id as from_field
    from (select * from "wave"."main_staging"."stg_payments" where merchant_id is not null and updated_at::date >= current_date - 1) dbt_subquery
    where merchant_id is not null
),

parent as (
    select merchant_id as to_field
    from "wave"."main_staging"."stg_merchants"
)

select
    from_field

from child
left join parent
    on child.from_field = parent.to_field

where parent.to_field is null

select
    payment_id as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from (select * from "wave"."main_staging"."stg_payments" where updated_at::date >= current_date - 1) dbt_subquery
where payment_id is not null
group by payment_id
having count(*) > 1

with all_values as (

    select
        is_agent as value_field,
        count(*) as n_records

    from "wave"."main_staging"."stg_wallets"
    group by is_agent

)

select *
from all_values
where value_field not in (
    'True','False'
)

with all_values as (

    from "wave"."main_staging"."stg_wallets"
    group by kyc_tier

select *

where value_field not in (

where country is null

select is_agent
from "wave"."main_staging"."stg_wallets"
where is_agent is null

select status
from "wave"."main_staging"."stg_wallets"
where status is null

select updated_at
from "wave"."main_staging"."stg_wallets"
where updated_at is null

select wallet_id
from "wave"."main_staging"."stg_wallets"
where wallet_id is null

select
    wallet_id as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "wave"."main_staging"."stg_wallets"
where wallet_id is not null
group by wallet_id
having count(*) > 1

select
    merchant_id,
    merchant_name,
    category,
    country,
    status,
    created_at,
    updated_at
from "wave"."main_staging"."stg_merchants"

with payments as (
    select
        payment_id,
        wallet_id,
        merchant_id,
        amount,
        currency,
        status,
        created_at,
        updated_at,
        country,
        channel
    from "wave"."main_staging"."stg_payments"
    
    
    
    where updated_at >= (
        select 

    (max(updated_at) + cast(-3 as bigint) * interval 1 hour)
        from "wave"."main_core"."fct_payments"
    )
    

),

-- SCD2 snapshots resolve dimension attributes valid at time of payment,
-- enabling accurate historical KPI breakdowns by merchant category and KYC tier.
merchants as (
    select
        merchant_id,
        category,
        dbt_valid_from,
        dbt_valid_to
    from "wave"."main_snapshots"."snap_merchants"
),

wallets as (
    select
        wallet_id,
        kyc_tier,
        is_agent,
        dbt_valid_from,
        dbt_valid_to
    from "wave"."main_snapshots"."snap_wallets"
)

select
    p.payment_id,
    p.wallet_id,
    p.merchant_id,
    p.amount,
    p.currency,
    p.status,
    p.created_at,
    p.updated_at,
    p.created_at::date                as payment_date,
    p.country,
    p.channel,
    coalesce(m.category, 'none')      as merchant_category,
    w.kyc_tier,
    w.is_agent
from payments p
left join merchants m
    on p.merchant_id = m.merchant_id
    and p.created_at >= m.dbt_valid_from
    and (p.created_at < m.dbt_valid_to or m.dbt_valid_to is null)
left join wallets w
    on p.wallet_id = w.wallet_id
    and p.created_at >= w.dbt_valid_from
    and (p.created_at < w.dbt_valid_to or w.dbt_valid_to is null)

where wallet_id is not null
group by wallet_id
having count(*) > 1

with affected_dates as (
    select distinct payment_date
    from "wave"."main_core"."fct_payments"
    
    
    
    where updated_at >= (
        select 

    (max(max_source_updated_at) + cast(-3 as bigint) * interval 1 hour)
        from "wave"."main_kpi"."agg_payments_daily"
    )
    

),

payments as (
    select p.*
    from "wave"."main_core"."fct_payments" p
    
    inner join affected_dates d on p.payment_date = d.payment_date
    
),

exchange_rates as (
    select
        currency,
        rate_date,
        rate_to_usd
    from "wave"."raw"."exchange_rates"
),

agg as (
    select
        payment_date,
        country,
        currency,
        status,
        channel,
        merchant_category,
        coalesce(kyc_tier::varchar, 'unknown')  as kyc_tier,
        count(*)                                as payment_count,
        sum(amount)                             as total_amount,
        max(updated_at)                         as max_source_updated_at
    from payments
    group by 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 7
)

select
    a.payment_date,
    a.country,
    a.currency,
    a.status,
    a.channel,
    a.merchant_category,
    a.kyc_tier,
    a.payment_count,
    a.total_amount,
    a.total_amount * er.rate_to_usd         as total_amount_usd,
    a.max_source_updated_at
from agg a
left join exchange_rates er
    on er.currency = a.currency
    and er.rate_date = (
        select max(rate_date)
        from exchange_rates
        where currency = a.currency
        and rate_date <= a.payment_date
    )

with payments as (
    select
        payment_id,
        wallet_id,
        amount,
        currency,
        created_at,
        country,
        channel,
        merchant_id,
        merchant_category,
        kyc_tier
    from "wave"."main_core"."fct_payments"
    where status = 'success'
    and date_trunc('month', created_at) = date_trunc('month', current_date)
),

exchange_rates as (
    select
        currency,
        rate_date,
        rate_to_usd
    from "wave"."raw"."exchange_rates"
)

select
    p.payment_id,
    p.wallet_id,
    p.amount,
    p.currency,
    p.amount * er.rate_to_usd  as amount_usd,
    p.created_at,
    p.country,
    p.channel,
    p.merchant_id,
    p.merchant_category,
    p.kyc_tier
from payments p
left join exchange_rates er
    on er.currency = p.currency
    and er.rate_date = (
        select max(rate_date)
        from exchange_rates
        where currency = p.currency
        and rate_date <= p.created_at::date
    )

with all_values as (

    select
        channel as value_field,
        count(*) as n_records

    from "wave"."main_kpi"."agg_payments_daily"
    group by channel

)

where amount is null

where channel is null

where created_at is null

from "wave"."main_intermediate"."int_compliance_monthly_payments"
where currency is null

from "wave"."main_intermediate"."int_compliance_monthly_payments"
where merchant_category is null

select payment_id
from "wave"."main_intermediate"."int_compliance_monthly_payments"
where payment_id is null

select wallet_id
from "wave"."main_intermediate"."int_compliance_monthly_payments"
where wallet_id is null

select
    payment_id as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "wave"."main_intermediate"."int_compliance_monthly_payments"
where payment_id is not null
group by payment_id
having count(*) > 1

with wallet_monthly_volumes as (
    select
        wallet_id,
        sum(amount_usd)  as monthly_volume_usd,
        count(*)         as payment_count,
        max(created_at)  as last_payment_at
    from "wave"."main_intermediate"."int_compliance_monthly_payments"
    group by wallet_id
),

wallets as (
    select
        wallet_id,
        country,
        kyc_tier,
        is_agent
    from "wave"."main_core"."dim_wallets"
),

limits as (
    select
        kyc_tier,
        monthly_limit_usd
    from "wave"."main"."kyc_limits"
)

select
    w.wallet_id,
    w.country,
    w.kyc_tier,
    w.is_agent,
    mv.monthly_volume_usd,
    l.monthly_limit_usd,
    mv.monthly_volume_usd - l.monthly_limit_usd  as breach_amount_usd,
    mv.payment_count,
    mv.last_payment_at,
    now()                as checked_at
from wallet_monthly_volumes mv
inner join wallets w on mv.wallet_id = w.wallet_id
inner join limits l on w.kyc_tier = l.kyc_tier
where mv.monthly_volume_usd > l.monthly_limit_usd

with all_values as (

    select
        kyc_tier as value_field,
        count(*) as n_records

    from "wave"."main_compliance"."mart_compliance_current"
    group by kyc_tier

)

select *
from all_values
where value_field not in (
    '0','1','2'
)

select
    1
from "wave"."main_compliance"."mart_compliance_current"

where not(breach_amount_usd > 0)

select
    1
from "wave"."main_compliance"."mart_compliance_current"

where not(monthly_volume_usd > 0)

select breach_amount_usd
from "wave"."main_compliance"."mart_compliance_current"
where breach_amount_usd is null

where checked_at is null

where payment_count is null

from "wave"."main_compliance"."mart_compliance_current"
where wallet_id is null

select
    wallet_id as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "wave"."main_compliance"."mart_compliance_current"
where wallet_id is not null
group by wallet_id
having count(*) > 1

select
    p.payment_id,
    p.wallet_id,
    p.amount,
    p.currency,
    p.amount_usd,
    p.created_at,
    p.country,
    p.channel,
    p.merchant_id,
    p.merchant_category,
    p.kyc_tier,
    b.checked_at
from "wave"."main_intermediate"."int_compliance_monthly_payments" p
inner join "wave"."main_compliance"."mart_compliance_current" b on p.wallet_id = b.wallet_id

select
    wallet_id,
    country,
    kyc_tier,
    is_agent,
    monthly_volume_usd,
    monthly_limit_usd,
    breach_amount_usd,
    payment_count,
    checked_at
from "wave"."main_compliance"."mart_compliance_current"

with active_wallets as (
    select count(*) as total_active_wallets
    from "wave"."main_core"."dim_wallets"
    where status = 'active'
),

transacting as (
    select count(distinct wallet_id) as transacting_wallets
    from "wave"."main_intermediate"."int_compliance_monthly_payments"
),

breaching as (
    select
        count(*)        as breaching_wallets,
        max(checked_at) as checked_at
    from "wave"."main_compliance"."mart_compliance_current"
)

select
    b.checked_at,
    a.total_active_wallets,
    t.transacting_wallets,
    b.breaching_wallets,
    case
        when t.transacting_wallets = 0 then null
        else b.breaching_wallets::float / t.transacting_wallets
    end                                                                         as breach_rate
from active_wallets a, transacting t, breaching b

with all_values as (

    select
        channel as value_field,
        count(*) as n_records

    from "wave"."main_compliance"."mart_compliance_current_transactions"
    group by channel

)

select *
from all_values
where value_field not in (
    'ussd','app','agent'
)

with all_values as (

    select
        merchant_category as value_field,
        count(*) as n_records

    from "wave"."main_compliance"."mart_compliance_current_transactions"
    group by merchant_category

)

select *
from all_values
where value_field not in (
    'supermarket','ecommerce','taxi','utility','other','none'
)

with child as (
    select wallet_id as from_field
    from "wave"."main_compliance"."mart_compliance_current_transactions"
    where wallet_id is not null
),

parent as (
    select wallet_id as to_field
    from "wave"."main_compliance"."mart_compliance_current"
)

select
    from_field

from child
left join parent
    on child.from_field = parent.to_field

where parent.to_field is null

select
    payment_id as unique_field,
    count(*) as n_records

from "wave"."main_compliance"."mart_compliance_current_transactions"
where payment_id is not null
group by payment_id
having count(*) > 1

with all_values as (

    select
        kyc_tier as value_field,
        count(*) as n_records

    from "wave"."main_compliance"."mart_compliance_history"
    group by kyc_tier

)

select *
from all_values
where value_field not in (
    '0','1','2'
)

    1
from "wave"."main_compliance"."mart_compliance_history"

where not(breach_amount_usd > 0)
